product: Delta Sharing recipients can apply row filters and column masks (GA)
tagline: Delta Sharing recipients can now apply their own row filters and columns masks on shared tables and shared foreign tables.
what_it_does: Delta Sharing recipients can now apply their own row filters and columns masks on shared tables and shared foreign tables. However, Delta Sharing providers still cannot share data assets that have row level security or column masks. For details, see Apply row filters and column masks.
why_it_matters: note If you are creating a catalog from an SAP BDC share, SAP semantic metadata (table and column comments, primary keys, foreign keys, and governance tags) syncs automatically into the catalog.
plain_summary: Delta Sharing recipients can now apply their own row filters and columns masks on shared tables and shared foreign tables. However, Delta Sharing providers still cannot share data assets that have row level security or column masks.
key_takeaway: Delta Sharing recipients can now apply their own row filters and columns masks on shared tables and shared foreign tables.
